executionHistory.summary: Selected spec 007 Google Keep Connector for implementation. Reviewed spec.md, design.md, and scopes.md — all artifacts present and consistent.

Created comprehensive spec.md with problem statement, outcome contract, 7 goals, API access strategy (hybrid Takeout + gkeepapi), 13 requirements, 4 actors, 6 use cases, 13 Gherkin business scenarios, competitive landscape, 6 improvement proposals, UI scenario matrix, and non-functional requirements.

Created design.md with Design Brief, architecture overview (hybrid Takeout + gkeepapi via ML sidecar), 8 component designs, data model, 4 NATS subject contracts, pipeline integration flow, label-to-topic mapping algorithm with fuzzy matching, error handling matrix, security constraints, observability plan, testing strategy mapped to all 13 business scenarios.
Created scopes.md with 6 sequential scopes, 29 Gherkin scenarios mapped to all 13 business scenarios, 98 total tests across unit/integration/e2e. Full traceability matrix BS-001 through BS-013.

Hardened planning artifacts: fixed 8 issues including 4 Gherkin scenario coverage gaps, 3 traceability errors, and 1 test type misclassification. Added SCN-GK-024 through SCN-GK-029 for edge cases. Final: 29 Gherkin scenarios across 6 scopes. Verdict: HARDENED.

Implemented all 6 scopes: Takeout parser (Go), Keep connector with config/registry (Go), source qualifiers (Go), label-to-topic mapping (Go), gkeepapi Python bridge, image OCR pipeline (Python). 13 new files, 4 modified. 53 Go unit tests + 20 Python tests all PASS. Build/lint clean.

Executed full test suite via ./smackerel.sh test unit. Go: 24 packages pass including internal/connector/keep (0 failures, 53 tests). Python: 20 tests passed. All Gherkin scenarios have at least one mapped test. Test plan coverage verified against scenario-manifest.json.

Regression verification complete. All 24 Go packages pass, 20 Python tests pass. No regressions in existing NATS client tests (updated expected stream count to 4). Pre-existing E501 in ml/app/processor.py is not from Keep changes.
Simplification pass completed. Reviewed all 13 new files for unnecessary complexity. No dead code found. No over-abstractions. Each file has a clear single responsibility. No changes needed.

Gap analysis complete. All 29 Gherkin scenarios have mapped tests. All 6 scopes have DoD items covering all acceptance criteria. Traceability matrix covers all 13 business scenarios. No orphaned scenarios.
Stabilization pass completed. All tests deterministic — ran ./smackerel.sh test unit three times, zero flaky failures. No time-dependent assertions. No external network calls in unit tests.

Security review complete. gkeepapi credentials use env vars only — no config file storage. Opt-in gate enforced for unofficial API. OCR image data via NATS (internal only). SQL migration uses parameterized queries. File path validation prevents path traversal.

Validation pass completed. ./smackerel.sh check clean. ./smackerel.sh lint — 1 pre-existing E501 (not from Keep). ./smackerel.sh test unit — all pass. All DoD items verified checked. All Gherkin scenarios have mapped test evidence.

Audit pass completed. All 13 new files exist and compile. All 4 modified files have targeted changes only. No TODO/FIXME markers. report.md has per-scope evidence with test output. scenario-manifest.json covers all scenarios.

Chaos testing completed. Corrupted JSON — 97/100 notes parsed, 3 errors logged, no panic. Invalid cursor — full re-sync triggered. Missing import dir — error returned. OCR both engines fail — empty text returned. Trashed notes — filtered from output.

Documentation pass completed. report.md has per-scope execution evidence. scenario-manifest.json v2 has 29 SCN-007-NNN scenarios with linkedTests and evidenceRefs. uservalidation.md references all acceptance criteria.

Spec review completed. Verified alignment between spec.md requirements, design.md components, scopes.md plan, and delivered code. All 13 requirements have implementation evidence. No spec drift detected.

notes: Google Keep connector for passive note ingestion.
